title: Excalibur | Overflowing Bars Compat
description: Compatibility patch between Excalibur resourcepack and Overflowing Bars mod.
body:
This **unofficial** compatibility patch ensures that textures from the [**Overflowing Bars**](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars) mod seamlessly integrate with the [**Excalibur**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcepack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned **Overflowing Bars** mod HUD icons.
- Fixed default **Excalibur** resourcepack vehicle HUD icons.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside **Excalibur**.

**Special thanks to:**
- [**Maffhew**](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) - for the **Excalibur** resourcepack.
- [**Fuzs**](https://modrinth.com/user/Fuzs) - for the **Overflowing Bars** mod.

If you enjoyed this compatibility patch, feel free to tell others about it!
